headline: Newmont (NEM) Receives Key Regulatory Approvals for Red Chris Block Cave Transition
summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM)is one of the most profitable undervalued stocks to invest in. On June 19, Newmont received key regulatory approvals from the Province of British Columbia for its Red Chris Block Cave project, enabling the transition of the Red Chris Mine from open-pit operations to block caving. This move extends the mine’s operational life […]

headline: Newmont Gets Approvals to Advance Red Chris Block Cave Project
summary: NEM wins key approvals for its Red Chris Block Cave Project, paving the way for a 2026 investment decision and a mine-life extension.

headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE:NEM) Shines Under Peter Lynch’s Growth-at-a-Reasonable-Price Screen
summary: Newmont Corp (NEM) passes the Peter Lynch test with a PEG ratio of 0.56, 21% EPS growth, low debt, and strong profitability, making it a solid GARP investment opportunity.

headline: Best Value Stocks to Buy for June 23rd
summary: GCO, EQX and NEM made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) value stocks list on June 23rd, 2026.
